header.subtitle: Calculate your exact metabolic needs with premium scientific precision and elite-grade diagnostic tools.

step1.title: YOUR INFORMATION
step1.whoAreYouDesc: Select the profile that best matches you.

hardgainer.label: The Hardgainer
hardgainer.desc: Struggling to add mass despite consistent effort

rebuilder.label: The Rebuilder
rebuilder.desc: Returning after a break or injury

converter.label: The Converter
converter.desc: Shifting from excess fat to lean muscle

step2.title: SELECT YOUR OBJECTIVE
step2.desc: Your training protocol adapts to this.
step2.selectObjectiveFallback: Select an objective above to view the scientific protocol.

maintain.label: MAINTAIN
maintain.desc: Calibrate intake to match TDEE precisely — preserving lean mass, hormonal equilibrium, and metabolic stability.

bulk.label: BULK
bulk.desc: Activate mTOR signaling and optimize protein synthesis windows. A structured surplus triggers satellite cell recruitment and anabolic hormone response.

cut.label: CUT
cut.desc: Preserve muscle via strategic deficit engineering. Prioritize protein intake to prevent catabolism while managing cortisol and thyroid output.

recomp.label: RECOMP
recomp.desc: Simultaneously reduce fat and build lean tissue through nutrient partitioning, insulin sensitivity optimization, and precision timing.

ectomorph.label: ECTOMORPH
ectomorph.desc: Naturally lean with a faster metabolism. Built for endurance and agility. High NEAT, fast gastric emptying — requires strategic surplus.

mesomorph.label: MESOMORPH
mesomorph.desc: Naturally athletic with efficient muscle growth. Built for power and speed. Responds well to moderate training volume.

endomorph.label: ENDOMORPH
endomorph.desc: Stronger build with a slower metabolism. Built for stability and raw strength. Prioritizes nutrient partitioning and insulin management.

step5.title: ACTIVITY PROFILE
step5.desc: Your TDEE scales with your weekly output.

sedentary.label: Sedentary — Little or no exercise
sedentary.desc: Baseline metabolic rate calculation. Suitable if you work a desk job and do not engage in structured physical activity.

light.label: Light — 1–3 days / week
light.desc: Light physical activity or sports performed 1 to 3 days per week. Generates a mild increase in caloric baseline.

moderate.label: Moderate — 3–5 days / week
moderate.desc: Moderate intensity training 3 to 5 days per week. Requires sustained fuel for recovery and muscle glycogen replenishment.

active.label: Active — 6–7 days / week
active.desc: High frequency and intensity training almost daily. Requires robust caloric support to prevent catabolism.

very_active.label: Very Active — Physical job + training
very_active.desc: Intense daily training combined with a physically demanding occupation. Generates maximum metabolic burn.

step6bf.title: DO YOU KNOW YOUR BODY FAT %?
step6bf.desc: Optional: If you don't know it, you can leave it blank and continue.

step6.title: PRECISION TUNING
step6.bodyFatHint: Enable precision mode if you know your body fat %.

dashboard.accuracyLabel: Accuracy level of your engine sync
dashboard.awaitingSync: Awaiting metabolic synchronization. Run a calculation to generate your personalized AI coaching insight.

thankYou.subheadline: You didn't just run a calculator. You took the first step toward eating with precision — and that's exactly how real transformation starts.
thankYou.founderCopy: I'm Felipe — natural ectomorph, bulking specialist, and founder of Metamorfit. I built this system after years of frustration: training hard, eating more than people believed, and still seeing nothing change. The answer wasn't more volume. It was understanding my biology — digestion, recovery, hormonal balance — and building a protocol around it. Metamorfit is the system I'd had. Now it's yours.
thankYou.checkInboxBody: Your PDF meal plan is being delivered right now. Open it, review your daily macro targets, and start applying it today. The numbers are built around your body — trust the precision.
thankYou.emailTip: Don't see it? Check your spam or promotions folder — it's there.
thankYou.nextStep1Title: Open your plan and review your macro targets.
thankYou.nextStep1Body: Protein is your priority — hit that number first, every single day. The rest builds around it.
thankYou.nextStep2Title: Structure your eating for the next 7 days.
thankYou.nextStep2Body: Consistency in the first week matters more than perfection. Set your meals, then execute.
thankYou.nextStep3Body: You'll receive additional guidance on how to track, adjust, and optimize your intake as your body adapts.
thankYou.nextStep4Body: The Metamorfit Web App — launching soon — will be the system that tracks, adapts, and holds your nutrition to a higher standard.
thankYou.identityQuote: You didn't guess today. You didn't scroll another thread hoping someone would tell you what to eat.
thankYou.identityBody1: You submitted your data. You ran the numbers. You built a plan. That's not something everyone does — that's discipline expressing itself before the work has even started.
thankYou.identityBody2: Your body can grow. The biology is workable. What it needs is precision — and you just gave it that.
thankYou.teaserBody: Your meal plan is a strong start — but the Web App will take this further than a PDF ever could. Built specifically for natural lifters who want to eat with intention every day.
thankYou.teaserFootnote: This isn't another calorie counter. It's infrastructure for serious natural lifters.
thankYou.ctaBody: Follow Metamorfit for science-backed content on bulking, digestion, recovery, and natural muscle growth — and be first to know when the Web App launches.
thankYou.footerNote: No spam. No hype. Just the system.
